Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension

Class ExtensionTranslation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.AbstractTranslation
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension.ExtensionTranslation
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExtensionTranslation
public class ExtensionTranslation extends AbstractTranslation implements IExtensionTranslation
Translation of operator extensions to function applications. We do not translate extensions that come from a datatype (these are taken care by DatatypeTranslation), nor extensions that are not WD-strict (as these cannot be translated to mere function application). We maintain associative tables from operator signatures to dedicated translators.

    • getTargetTypeEnvironment

      public ISealedTypeEnvironment getTargetTypeEnvironment()
      Description copied from interface: IExtensionTranslation
      Returns a snapshot of the type environment of the formulas translated so far. The returned type environment is obtained by augmenting the initial type environment of this translation with all functions that have been created by the translation.
      Specified by:
      getTargetTypeEnvironment in interface IExtensionTranslation
      Returns:
      a snapshot of the translated type environment
